mapper.sql: id, invoiceNo, hand_date, do_id, modelNo, qty, caseno, barcode, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, delflag, fromWarehouseCode, toWarehouseCode, logisticsCode, expressCode, invoice_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_handover
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_handover (id, invoiceNo, hand_date, do_id, modelNo, qty, caseno, barcode, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, delflag, fromWarehouseCode, toWarehouseCode, logisticsCode, expressCode, invoice_id ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fromwarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{towarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logisticscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{expresscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

insert into dbo.ops_handover
id,
invoiceNo,
hand_date,
do_id,
modelNo,
qty,
caseno,
barcode,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
delflag,
fromWarehouseCode,
toWarehouseCode,
logisticsCode,
expressCode,
invoice_id,

#{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{handDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_handover
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hand_date = #{record.handDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
caseno = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fromWarehouseCode = #{record.fromwarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
toWarehouseCode = #{record.towarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logisticsCode = #{record.logisticscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
expressCode = #{record.expresscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update dbo.ops_handover set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hand_date = #{record.handDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, caseno = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fromWarehouseCode = #{record.fromwarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, toWarehouseCode = #{record.towarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logisticsCode = #{record.logisticscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, expressCode = #{record.expresscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_handover
invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hand_date = #{handDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
caseno = #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fromWarehouseCode = #{fromwarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
toWarehouseCode = #{towarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logisticsCode = #{logisticscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
expressCode = #{expresscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_handover set invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hand_date = #{handDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, caseno = #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fromWarehouseCode = #{fromwarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, toWarehouseCode = #{towarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logisticsCode = #{logisticscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, expressCode = #{expresscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
